summary: The implementation successfully addresses both REQ-1 and REQ-2. A backend function `getAllTransactions()` was added to return transaction data, and a frontend `TransactionHistoryPanel` component was created to display the transaction history below existing features. All required fields and acceptance criteria appear to be implemented based on the evidence in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Include company name in transaction data
missing_requirements.reason: The Transaction type and backend implementation show assetSymbol but no companyName field. REQ-1 explicitly requires 'company name' to be included in the transaction data returned by the backend.
